mano_cua.result_summary: SvelteLab页面因缺少$lib/dependency-report.json文件导致Vite构建错误，关闭错误overlay后页面完全空白，无法渲染任何界面元素，无法测试图片上传和ZIP导出功能
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The page is still blank. The SvelteLab app is completely non-functional due to the missing $lib/dependency-report.json file. The Vite build error prevents the app from loading at all.
